description: Combining an opioid with a benzodiazepine can cause profound sedation, slowed breathing, coma, and death. The FDA carries a boxed warning against this combination.
Opioid plus benzodiazepine markedly raises the risk of over-sedation and dangerously slow breathing. FDA boxed warning applies.
